features.notes: package.ts registers Boltz (folding/docking top-menu), runBoltz, and getBoltzConfigFolders; BoltzService.folding/docking/runBoltz/getBoltzConfigFolders contain the Docker-container-backed prediction logic; constants.ts holds the Config types and container path; boltz-app is the Boltz-1 demo app view with the prediction input form.

package.ts registers the Boltz-1 panel widget (boltzWidget) and the isApplicableBoltz condition; BoltzService.boltzWidget builds the Biostructure viewer + property table; utils.ts (getFromPdbs/prop) parses REMARK lines and renders per-row properties; constants.ts supplies BOLTZ_PROPERTY_DESCRIPTIONS and the CACHED_RESULTS cache.
